title: Data accuracy audit, guides, monster powers
features: Community guides system — markdown guides with YAML frontmatter, list/detail pages, submission form via Discord webhook, author social links, tooltip widget integration
Monster innate powers — 42 monsters now show powers applied at spawn (Territorial, Artifact, Slippery, Minion, Plating, etc.)
Guides, Runs, and Meta sections added to homepage with live counts
Slow Dancer's offensive Necrobinder guide and Lost's new player guide published
fixes: Outbreak power description showed '10' trigger threshold — now correctly shows '3' (from C# RepeatVar)
Asleep power description was 'TODO' — now shows 'Awakens upon losing HP or after 2 turns'
Galvanic power had unresolved [AfflictionTitle] — now shows 'Galvanized'
Tablet of Truth showed '3 Max HP' for all decipher steps — now shows 3/6/12/24 and 'Set Max HP to 1, Upgrade ALL cards'
Abyssal Baths showed '3 damage' for every linger — now shows exact per-step values (3-13) in all 14 languages
Unrest Site heal showed 0 — now shows 'Heal to full HP'
Missing monster hit counts — Byrdonis Peck (3x3), Entomancer Beeeees! (7x3 / 8x3 on A9)
Multiplayer runs missing JSON files — now saves for every player hash
Relic parsing fixes for property-backed DynamicVar fields
Enchantment card type restrictions and applicable_to field added
Affliction data fixes and potion drop rates added
Orphaned [/rainbow] closing tags stripped from descriptions
api_changes: New /api/guides endpoint — list with filters, detail by slug, POST submission
Monsters now include innate_powers field (power_id and amount)
Event descriptions now show gold ranges instead of flat values for randomized rewards
